CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Continued To May-06-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Onetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted: Plaintiffs Adityagiri Valluri and Nivedita Madigubba's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Onetary Sanctions is unopposed and granted. The defendant shall provide verified responses, without objection, to plaintiffs' Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production Of Documents, within twenty days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $860.00 are awarded to plaintiff to be paid at the time as service of the discovery responses. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: J. Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (D302/JPT/RBU)
